message:
feat(fcp-cli): expand budget command and core operation updates

Concurrent agent changes:
- Budget CLI command expansion
- Main entrypoint updates
- Core operation refinements
- Updated test vectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
